CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-03-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Nicole Adams, Reporter Beldon Yee.

Sara Paul, Esq., appearing on behalf of plaintiff, defendants Sarey Kohoun Tang and Denny Tang appearing in pro per.

Case called for trial, matter has settled. Defendant to pay to plaintiff $1,200.00 plus $85.00 in costs for a total of $1,285.00. Plaintiff has received check for total amount. Plaintiff will file dismissal with prejudice.

Off Calendar May-13-2002 Set For Trial On Sep-30-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
